rationale: Both evaluations award the identical score (4/10), list the identical strengths, and raise the same three concerns. The only differences are surface rewordings ('Lack of specific experience in Java' vs 'Lack of direct experience with Java', 'No direct experience in the insurance sector' vs 'No specific experience in the insurance sector', 'German language proficiency is basic' vs 'Basic German language skills'). None of the changed text references Brazil, the relocated employers, or any geographic/national signal. These are paraphrases well within ordinary run-to-run noise.
